1747700.name: ASTRO ACE Official Soundtrack
1747700.description:
Astro ace main theme combines the dreamy sound from a pad instrument reminiscent of the universe and a rhythmic percussion instrument. also, that adding grandeur with a magnificent brass sound.

The menu theme is loop-type music with a trendy and addictive feel by a Pluck instrument sound and a Vocal Chop Lead instrument sound.
